resolvedQuestions.question: Which expansion should happen first across modes?
resolvedQuestions.answer: Shared Brand-vs-Product operating register before per-mode additions.

resolvedQuestions.question: Which modes receive the highest-leverage assets?
resolvedQuestions.answer: Audit and interface receive the densest asset additions; md-generator receives authoring template additions; foundations and motion receive targeted reference/top-up cards.

keyFindings.summary: Brand-vs-Product operating register is the only must-add prerequisite.
Interface should gain transform/pre-flight/content realism assets rather than broad new prose.
Foundations needs data-visualization and token handoff top-ups; color/type/layout bases are already present.
Motion should add an advanced effect decision gate and interaction-handoff bridge, not make GSAP/overdrive defaults.
Audit receives the most should-add work: model tells, remediation, mock-content, mechanical pre-flight checks.
md-generator should add an author-from-brief DESIGN.md path while preserving extraction fidelity.

ruledOutDirections.approach: Create net-new child skills during this lineage
ruledOutDirections.reason: Explicitly out of scope; gap-analysis says findings are not commitments.
Would reduce router precision and duplicate existing references.
ruledOutDirections.evidence: current mode resource maps and references
